usages.description: Foundations for toilet block at Office Complex (Job MW/TEZU/10/2025-26)
Damp proof course (DPC) & brickwork joints (Job MW/TEZU/15/2025-26)
Wall construction and toilet block layout
RCC lintels & chajjas for toilet block (Job MW/TEZU/18/2025-26)

food_logs.notes: Visitor: Bdkk (Long-term: 2026-06-17 to 2026-07-19, 33 days, 1 meals/day - Lunch)

site_diaries.workDone: Excavation work completed for HQ 181 MBC office toilet block. Cement PPC bags received from Lohitpur Building Materials. Brickwork started.
site_diaries.safetyLog: Helmets and safety gloves worn by all workers during concrete mixing. Site barricaded.
site_diaries.remarks: Cement inventory is healthy. Water supply is regular.

site_diaries.workDone: Damp proof course (DPC) completed for 619 SATA Bty Offrs toilet. Plastering in progress. Carpenter work on door frame completed.
site_diaries.safetyLog: Scaffolding checked and secured. Safety instructions briefed in the morning.
site_diaries.remarks: Slight delay in starting work in the morning due to high humidity, but target accomplished.

delay_weather_logs.delayNotes: Heavy afternoon rain forced workers to take shelter for 3 hours. Slowed down concrete pouring.
